briefdescription.para: Status of PUF word syndrome ready timeout.
Delay added to wait for key_rdy bit to be set during PUF regeneration.
0x0 - PUF registration started
0x1 - PUF registration complete
Validates the PUF access rules.

parameterdescription.para: is an input to validate the access rules against Registration, Re-registration, Testmode1 & Testmode2

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if validation was successful. ERROR if validation failed

inbodydescription.para:
To allow registration
Make sure that PUF registration is not disabled
If it re-registration then 2.1 Make sure that use RSA bits set in eFUSE.

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether PUF is already programmed or not.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if all rows are zero

briefdescription.para: This API programs the given data into specified row of eFUSE.

parameterdescription.para: specifies the row number to be programmed.
is pointer to 32 bit variable which holds data to be programmed.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the PS eFUSE PUF secure bits from cache or from eFUSE array based on user selection.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the XilSKey_Puf_Secure which holds the read eFUSE secure bits of PUF.

briefdescription.para: This function will poll for syndrome word is ready in the PUF_WORD register or till the timeout occurs.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - In case of Success XST_FAILURE - In case of Timeout.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the PS eFUSEs with the PUF helper data.

simplesect.para: To generate PufSyndromeData please use XilSKey_Puf_Registration API

briefdescription.para: This function reads the PUF helper data from eFUSE.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to data array which holds the PUF helper data read from eFUSEs.

simplesect.para: This function only reads from eFUSE non-volatile memory. There is no option to read from Cache.

briefdescription.para: This function programs eFUSE with CHash value.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if chash is programmed successfully.

simplesect.para: To generate the CHash value, please use XilSKey_Puf_Registration function.

briefdescription.para: This function reads eFUSE PUF CHash data from the eFUSE array or cache based on the user read option.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer which holds the read back value of the chash.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

simplesect.para: Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for reading from cache..

briefdescription.para: This function programs eFUSE PUF auxiliary data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the eFUSE is programmed successfully.

simplesect.para: To generate auxiliary data, please use XilSKey_Puf_Registration function.

briefdescription.para: This function reads eFUSE PUF auxiliary data from eFUSE array or cache based on user read option.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer which holds the read back value of PUF's auxiliary data.

Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if PUF auxiliary data is read successfully.

simplesect.para: Cache reload is required for obtaining updated values for reading from cache.

briefdescription.para: This function performs registration of PUF which generates a new KEK and associated CHash, Auxiliary and PUF-syndrome data which are unique for each silicon.

simplesect.para: With the help of generated PUF syndrome data, it will be possible to re-generate same PUF KEK.

inbodydescription.para: Request PUF to register. This will trigger an interrupt to CSUROM

briefdescription.para: This function regenerates the PUF data so that the PUF's output can be used as the key source to the AES-GCM hardware cryptographic engine.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XilSKey_Puf instance.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the eFUSE PUF secure bits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if eFUSE PUF secure bits are programmed successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to read the PS eFUSE PUF secure bits from cache or from eFUSE array.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the XilSKey_Puf_Secure structure which holds the read eFUSE secure bits from the PUF.

- Indicates whether or not to read from the actual eFUSE array or from the eFUSE cache.
0(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_CACHE) Reads from cache
1(XSK_EFUSEPS_READ_FROM_EFUSE) Reads from eFUSE array

briefdescription.para: This file contains the APIs for registering PUF, eFUSE programming and reading the PUF helper data, CHASH and Auxiliary data.

detaileddescription.para: Ver Who Date Changes 6.1 vns 10/17/16 First release. vns 11/07/16 Fixed shutter value to 0x0100005e, as sysosc selection is fixed for PUF registration. 6.2 vns 02/18/17 Added masking for PUF auxiliary read. 6.6 vns 06/06/18 Added doxygen tags 6.7 arc 01/05/19 Fixed MISRA-C violations. arc 03/15/19 Modified initial default status value as XST_FAILURE mmd 03/17/19 Handled buffer underflow issue and added timeouts during syndrome data reading rama 03/25/19 Added polling routine for PUF ready state 6.8 psl 06/07/19 Added doxygen tags. psl 06/25/19 Fixed Coverity warnings. psl 06/28/19 Added doxygen tags. psl 07/05/19 Added Asserts for validation. psl 07/23/19 Fixed input validation. psl 07/29/19 Fixed MISRA-C violation vns 08/29/19 Initialized Status variables 6.9 kpt 02/16/20 Fixed Coverity warnings kpt 02/27/20 Removed XilSKey_Puf_Debug2 which is used only for debug purpose vns 03/18/20 Fixed Armcc compilation errors kal 03/18/20 Added Temp and Voltage checks before writing Puf Helper data, Puf Chash and Puf Aux. kpt 03/17/20 Replaced direct eFuse reads with cache reads and Error code is returned when user chooses read option as eFuse kal 04/09/20 Added Temp and Voltage checks before unlocking the controller. kal 05/14/20 Added Cache Reload in XilSKey_Write_Puf_EfusePs_SecureBits to reflect programmed bit when read from puf example. 7.0 am 10/04/20 Resolved MISRA C violations 7.2 am 07/13/21 Fixed doxygen warnings 7.4 kal 02/16/23 Increased usleep value to 6ms in Puf regeneration function nf 03/13/23 Fixed shifting of Puf auxiliary data in puf status register 7.6 har 04/02/24 Added description for XILSKEY_PUF_KEK_REGEN_RDY_TIMEOUT macro
